source: CONFIRMED. Wikipedia 'List of S&P 500 companies' shows TAP (Molson Coors Beverage Company) as a current S&P 500 member (listed added 1976-06-30 under the legacy Coors lineage). company: USAir Group, Inc. (later US Airways Group)
source: VERIFIED. USAir Group (ticker U) suffered six straight years of net losses 1989-1994 (FY1994 net loss ~$685M including charges per USAir Group SEC filings), and was removed from the S&P 500 during this mid-1990s distress. The fja05680/sp500 historical-components dataset, whose point-in-time lists begin 1996-01-02, does NOT contain ticker 'U' (confirmed by direct inspection of sp500_ticker_start_end.csv on GitHub - U is absent), proving USAir was already out of the index before 1996. The May 2000-July 2001 UAL/US Airways merger attempt (US Airways Group 8-K filings, SEC CIK 701345) collapsed and did not return it to the index. It simply left with no renamed continuation, so continued_as is empty. The exact day of removal in the mid-1990s could not be pinned from a primary S&P source; it was no later than Jan 1996; ~1995. Confidence remains medium due to the unpinned exact date.

company: Viacom Inc. (the 1994-2005 company; legal successor became CBS Corporation)
source: VERIFIED. The original Viacom Inc. (VIA/VIA.B) remained in the S&P 500 through and beyond the 2000 CBS acquisition. VERIFIED. Walgreen Co. continued in the S&P 500 well past 2000. Effective for trading Wednesday Dec 31, 2014 it reorganized as Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc. and changed name/ticker WAG->WBA, moving its primary listing to Nasdaq (Nasdaq Trader DTN2014-44 'Walgreens to Begin Sole Listing on Nasdaq on Wednesday, December 31, 2014'; MIAX corporate-action alert 2014-12-30; Walgreen 8-K SEC CIK 104207). It remained in the S&P 500 until 2025-08-28, when Sycamore Partners completed taking it private (~$10B/up to $23.7B total); WBA was removed from the S&P 500 effective before market open Aug 28 2025, replaced by Interactive Brokers (IBKR) (Chain Drug Review 'End of an era: Walgreens exits S&P 500'; Yahoo Finance). fja05680/sp500 sp500_ticker_start_end.csv: WBA 1996-01-02 to 2025-08-28. continued_as = WBA (correct).
